batch identifier (e.g. \"MFR-2024-B001\").","_costPerUnit":"Cost per medicine unit (in smallest currency unit).","_currency":"Currency string: \"PKR\", \"USD\", etc.","_dosageForm":"\"Tablet\", \"Syrup\", \"Injection\", etc.","_expiryDate":"Expiry date as unix timestamp.","_genericName":"INN generic name.","_manufacturerName":"Legal name of the manufacturing company.","_metadataCID":"IPFS CID of full batch metadata JSON (can be set later).","_mfgDate":"Manufacturing date as unix timestamp.","_productName":"Brand / trade name.","_qrCodeCID":"IPFS CID of the QR code image (can be set later).","_rmNames":"Raw material names array.","_rmQuantities":"Raw material quantities array (parallel to names).","_rmUnits":"Raw material units array (parallel to names).","_strength":"\"500mg\", \"250mg/5ml\", etc.","_totalQuantity":"Total units produced in this batch."}},"adjustStock(string,address,address,uint256)":{"params":{"_batchNumber":"The batch being transferred.","_from":"Current holder losing stock.","_quantity":"Number of units moving.","_to":"Next holder gaining stock."}}},"stateVariables":{"allBatchNumbers":{"details":"All batch numbers ever created (for iteration)"},"authorisedCallers":{"details":"Authorised callers (TransferContract address once deployed)"},"batchHolders":{"details":"All holders who have ever held a batch (for expiry sweeps)"},"batches":{"details":"Primary store: batchNumber \u2192 Batch"},"manufacturerBatches":{"details":"Per-manufacturer batch index: address \u2192 batchNumbers[]"},"nodeStock":{"details":"Per-node stock: batchNumber \u2192 holderAddress \u2192 StockEntry      Updated by both this contract and TransferContract."}},"title":"ProductContract","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"addBatch(string,string,string,string,string,string,string[],uint256[],string[],uint256,string,uint256,uint256,uint256,string,string)":{"notice":"Add Called exclusively by TransferContract when ownership moves."},"batchExistsCheck(string)":{"notice":"Simple existence check used by TraceContract."},"deductSale(string,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Pharmacist sells to a buyer (reduces pharmacist's stock). Used by Distributor to see what is available to request."},"getAllBatchNumbers()":{"notice":"Returns all batch numbers ever created."},"getAvailableStockBatches(address)":{"notice":"Returns batch numbers where a specific address still has         non-zero stock \u2014 used to show \"available stock\" dashboards."},"getBatch(string)":{"notice":"Returns the full Batch struct for a given batch number.         Note: rawMaterials array is NOT returned here (use getRawMaterials)."},"getBatchHolders(string)":{"notice":"Returns all addresses that have ever held a batch."},"getBatchStatus(string)":{"notice":"Returns the current on-chain status of a batch.         If the expiry date has passed, returns Expired even if         the status hasn't been written yet (lazy check)."},"getBatchesByManufacturer(address)":{"notice":"Returns all batches created by a specific manufacturer."},"getExpiredStockBatches(address)":{"notice":"Returns batch numbers that are expired AND where the         holder still has non-zero stock (for return/recall workflows)."},"getQRData(string)":{"notice":"Returns QR and metadata CIDs (for the buyer verification page)."},"getRawMaterials(string)":{"notice":"Returns the raw materials list for a batch."},"getRecalledBatches()":{"notice":"Returns all Recalled batches (system-wide). Admin use."},"getStockEntry(string,address)":{"notice":"Returns the full StockEntry for a holder."},"getStockOf(string,address)":{"notice":"Returns the stock quantity of a specific batch held by a specific address."},"isBatchValid(string)":{"notice":"Check whether a batch is still valid (Active and not expired)."},"recallBatch(string,string)":{"notice":"Mark a batch as Recalled. documentation.text: @dev Lifecycle states of a medicine batch.
@dev Per-node stock entry.  One record exists per (batchNo, holderAddress).
@dev Primary store: batchNumber → Batch
@dev All batch numbers ever created (for iteration)
@dev Per-manufacturer batch index: address → batchNumbers[]

@dev Per-node stock: batchNumber → holderAddress → StockEntry
      Updated by both this contract and TransferContract.
@dev All holders who have ever held a batch (for expiry sweeps)
@dev Authorised callers (TransferContract address once deployed)

devdoc.details: Manufacturers add batches here.  TransferContract calls         adjustStock() whenever ownership moves down the chain.         All role checks are delegated to RegistryContract.

params._costPerUnit: Cost per medicine unit (in smallest currency unit).
params._manufacturerName: Legal name of the manufacturing company.
params._metadataCID: IPFS CID of full batch metadata JSON (can be set later).
params._qrCodeCID: IPFS CID of the QR code image (can be set later).
params._rmQuantities: Raw material quantities array (parallel to names).
params._rmUnits: Raw material units array (parallel to names).
params._totalQuantity: Total units produced in this batch.

allBatchNumbers.details: All batch numbers ever created (for iteration)

batchHolders.details: All holders who have ever held a batch (for expiry sweeps)

nodeStock.details: Per-node stock: batchNumber → holderAddress → StockEntry      Updated by both this contract and TransferContract.

devdoc.title: ProductContract

addBatch(string,string,string,string,str.notice: Add a new medicine batch to the blockchain.

adjustStock(string,address,address,uint2.notice: Deduct stock from a sender and credit it to a receiver.         Called exclusively by TransferContract when ownership moves.

batchExistsCheck(string).notice: Simple existence check used by TraceContract.

deductSale(string,address,uint256).notice: Pharmacist sells to a buyer (reduces pharmacist's stock).         Called by TransferContract when a sale is recorded.

expireAllOverdueBatches().notice: Bulk-expire all batches whose expiryDate has passed.         Anyone can call this (gas incentive can be added by the project).

expireBatch(string).notice: Expire a single batch by batch number.         Callable by admin, or by any approved entity checking their own stock.

getActiveBatchesAtManufacturer(address).notice: Returns all Active (non-expired, non-recalled) batches         that still have stock remaining at the manufacturer source.         Used by Distributor to see what is available to request.

getAllBatchNumbers().notice: Returns all batch numbers ever created.

getAvailableStockBatches(address).notice: Returns batch numbers where a specific address still has         non-zero stock — used to show "available stock" dashboards.

getBatch(string).notice: Returns the full Batch struct for a given batch number.         Note: rawMaterials array is NOT returned here (use getRawMaterials).

getBatchHolders(string).notice: Returns all addresses that have ever held a batch.

getBatchStatus(string).notice: Returns the current on-chain status of a batch.         If the expiry date has passed, returns Expired even if         the status hasn't been written yet (lazy check).

getBatchesByManufacturer(address).notice: Returns all batches created by a specific manufacturer.

getExpiredStockBatches(address).notice: Returns batch numbers that are expired AND where the         holder still has non-zero stock (for return/recall workflows).

getQRData(string).notice: Returns QR and metadata CIDs (for the buyer verification page).

getRawMaterials(string).notice: Returns the raw materials list for a batch.

getRecalledBatches().notice: Returns all Recalled batches (system-wide). Admin use.

getStockEntry(string,address).notice: Returns the full StockEntry for a holder.

getStockOf(string,address).notice: Returns the stock quantity of a specific batch held by a specific address.

isBatchValid(string).notice: Check whether a batch is still valid (Active and not expired).

recallBatch(string,string).notice: Mark a batch as Recalled. Callable by the manufacturer who         created it, or by admin.

setAuthorisedCaller(address,bool).notice: Grant or revoke permission for a contract (e.g. TransferContract)         to call adjustStock() and other restricted functions.

updateBatchDetails(string,string,string,.notice: Correct non-critical batch fields (dosage form, strength, CIDs).         Core identity fields (batchNumber, mfgDate, expiryDate, quantity)         are intentionally immutable after creation.

updateQR(string,string,string).notice: Update or add QR code and metadata IPFS CIDs after batch creation.         Useful when the QR is generated off-chain right after batch is mined.

verifyBatch(string).notice: Returns minimal info needed by a Buyer to verify a medicine.

userdoc.notice: Manages medicine batch creation, raw-material records, QR metadata,         stock levels, expiry tracking, and recall management for the         Blockchain-Based Medicine Supply Chain system.
